## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes (biome + tsc + vitest)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for any behavior change
- [ ] This does not introduce a runtime dependency
- [ ] If this changes verdicts, it does not add false `unsupported` results
      (prefer `unverifiable` when uncertain)
